items.title: LIVE: Venezuelans attend mass in honor of twin earthquake victims
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Venezuelans attend a mass in honor of those killed in the twin earthquakes that struck the country on June 24.

The magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 quakes killed more than 5,000 people, according to authorities, and caused widespread damage to homes, infrastructure and other buildings across northern Venezuela, including in the capital, Caracas. The government estimates that nearly 17,000 people were injured and almost 18,000 remain homeless

#Venezuela #Earthquakes #Mass #Victims #Caracas #Live #News #Reuters

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: LIVE: Trump speaks at White House Correspondents' Association dinner
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>President Trump is expected to deliver what the White House described as a "unifying yet vicious" speech at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner, a gathering celebrating press freedom that was postponed after a shooting outside the original event.
 
#WhiteHouse #Trump #WhiteHouseCorrespondentsDinner #PressFreedom #Press #Live #Reuters #News

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: LeBron James' 'last' NBA move
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>LeBron James has decided to join the Philadelphia 76ers for the final chapter of his NBA career, forgoing bigger paydays for one more shot at a championship with a franchise that has not won a title in 43 years. Reuters Senior Sports Reporter Frank Pingue explains what's behind the stunning move.
 
#labronjames #nba #basketball #celebrity #star</article>

items.title: ‘Horrible, stressful night' protecting homes in southwest France
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>As wildfires tore through southwest France overnight, Ludovic Pollet refused to leave his home, spending hours alongside his wife and son, battling spot fires in neighboring gardens in a bid to save homes on the edge of the forest.
 
#fire #france #emergency #wildfires #firefighters</article>

items.title: Traffic in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A vessel tracker shows traffic in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait a day after President Trump promised "major military punishment" for Iran and its Houthi allies after the Yemeni fighters struck two Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea, extending the Middle East war to a second major shipping chokepoint.

#BabelMandeb #Strait #RedSea #Houthis #Iran #IranWar #MiddleEast #Ship #Live #Reuters #News

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: LIVE: Traffic in the Strait of Hormuz
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A vessel tracker shows traffic in the Strait of Hormuz as daily vessel transits were steady at three for each of the past three days, according to preliminary ship-tracking data, during ongoing shipping risks in the Middle East and as oil prices surged back to $100 a barrel.
 
#StraitOfHormuz #Shipping #Oil #Energy #Iran #MiddleEast #Live #Reuters #News #Live #Reuters #News

items.title: LIVE: Smoke rises over hills after wildfire in central Spain
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Smoke billows from the mountains in El Tiemblo following a wildfire in central Spain, a day after the government declared a national emergency as a series of blazes threatened communities near Madrid and in the neighboring province of Avila, forcing more than 10,000 people to evacuate.
 
#Wildfires #Spain #Smoke #Mountains #Environment #ClimateChange #Live #Reuters #News

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.title: Israel launches military operation after deadly West Bank clash
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Four Palestinians and two Israeli soldiers were killed near a Palestinian village in a confrontation that added to a growing toll over recent weeks as Israeli settler violence has intensified against Palestinians in the occupied West Bank. 

#israel #palestinian #westbank #middleeast #middleeastconflict #News #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: LIVE: House forum on ICE's use of force in death of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Several Democratic lawmakers host an oversight forum in Houston, Texas, titled "Seeking Justice: Oversight of ICE's Use of Force in the Death of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo." Earlier this month, an ICE agent in Houston's heavily Hispanic East End fatally shot Salgado.
 
#House #LorenzoSalgadoAraujo #OversightForum #Texas #Live #News #Reuters

Keep up with the latest news from around the world: https://www.reuters.com/</article>

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Indian stars Ranbir Kapoor and Yash arrived at the San Diego Comic-Con on July 23 to promote the upcoming epic "Ramayana," which is thousands of years old and a cornerstone of Indian culture.
